message:
✨ feat: add tab rename (double-click) and terminate tmux sessions from UI (#93)

- Double-click tab name to rename inline (Enter/blur saves, Escape cancels)
- User-renamed tabs no longer get auto-overwritten by command tracking
- Added DELETE /api/tmux-sessions/:name backend endpoint to terminate tmux sessions
- Added terminateTmuxSession() method to TerminalManager (removes session + cleans up managed terminals)
- Added trash icon in tmux attach dropdown to remove sessions directly from UI

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
